positive: A minimalistic, geometric illustration of a sleeping crescent moon and a stylized constellation of shooting stars, forming an ethereal night sky pattern. The style is modern celestial line art, featuring deep indigo and sapphire blue backgrounds contrasted with crisp, glowing gold and silver linework. The composition is perfectly centered, designed as a repeating pattern for apparel printing. Elements include abstract geometric stars, stylized constellations (like Ursa Major simplified), and a gentle crescent moon silhouette. The overall mood is serene, magical, and sophisticated. High contrast, flat vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
